_comment: CI quality-gate thresholds. Floors (min) and ceilings (max) are set with margin below/above the measured deterministic baseline so normal corpus tweaks pass but real regressions fail the build. Baseline (TF-IDF, no faiss, no rerank, extractive writer): hit_rate@k 1.0, mrr 0.767, faithfulness 0.679, grounded_rate 1.0, expected_coverage 0.9, answer_relevance 1.0, citation_coverage 0.61, refusal_rate 0.0. Regenerate the metric files with: python -m adip.mlops.run_rag_eval --backend tfidf --no-faiss && python -m adip.mlops.run_generation_eval
